## Summary

Describe the repository improvement in one short paragraph.

## Type of change

- documentation
- skill update
- experiment note
- template addition
- security or hygiene improvement
- repository metadata support

## Evidence level

- code-confirmed
- artifact-confirmed
- experiment-confirmed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets are included
- [ ] No private source material is included
- [ ] Any logs or examples were redacted where needed
